message:
fix: enforce budget governor tier ordering, harden backoff bounds, remove dead constants

HybridBudgetGovernorConfig::default() now clamps critical_ms to tight_ms
so the Critical tier threshold is always <= the Tight tier threshold.
restart_backoff_ms gains a min/max inversion guard. ArchiveScanStats
derives Debug/Clone/Copy/Serialize, and doctor audit summary switches
from truncate_path() to truncate_str(). Dead test-only constants and
an unused PathBuf import are removed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
